'''ât-t-g''' ('''katatag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:maderize|maderize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-t-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:maderize|maderize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-t-g
|-
! Lemma
| katatag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitatag|thitatag]] || [[word:jitatag|jitatag]] || [[word:shitatag|shitatag]] || [[word:kitatag|kitatag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutatag|thuthutatag]] || [[word:jujutatag|jujutatag]] || [[word:shushutatag|shushutatag]] || [[word:kukutatag|kukutatag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutatag|thutatag]] || [[word:jutatag|jutatag]] || [[word:shutatag|shutatag]] || [[word:kutatag|kutatag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutatag|thutatag]] || [[word:jutatag|jutatag]] || [[word:shutatag|shutatag]] || [[word:kutatag|kutatag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetatag|thetatag]] || [[word:jetatag|jetatag]] || [[word:shetatag|shetatag]] || [[word:ketatag|ketatag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotatag|thothotatag]] || [[word:jojotatag|jojotatag]] || [[word:shoshotatag|shoshotatag]] || [[word:kokotatag|kokotatag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotatag|thotatag]] || [[word:jotatag|jotatag]] || [[word:shotatag|shotatag]] || [[word:kotatag|kotatag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotatag|thotatag]] || [[word:jotatag|jotatag]] || [[word:shotatag|shotatag]] || [[word:kotatag|kotatag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtatag|thĂŠtatag]] || [[word:jĂŠtatag|jĂŠtatag]] || [[word:shĂŠtatag|shĂŠtatag]] || [[word:kĂŠtatag|kĂŠtatag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatatag|thathatatag]] || [[word:jajatatag|jajatatag]] || [[word:shashatatag|shashatatag]] || [[word:kakatatag|kakatatag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatatag|thatatag]] || [[word:jatatag|jatatag]] || [[word:shatatag|shatatag]] || [[word:katatag|katatag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatatag|thatatag]] || [[word:jatatag|jatatag]] || [[word:shatatag|shatatag]] || [[word:katatag|katatag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatatag|shatatag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatatag|goshatatag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatatag|gokishatatag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatatagnĂŒ|shatatagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatatagnknĂŒ|goshatatagnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatatagnĂŒ|gokishatatagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatatagshĂ«|shatatagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatatagnkshĂ«|goshatatagnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatatagshĂ«|gokishatatagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatatagro|shatatagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatatagnkro|goshatatagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatatagro|gokishatatagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatatagmu|shatatagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatatagnkmu|goshatatagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatatagmu|gokishatatagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatatagsher|shatatagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatatagnksher|goshatatagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatatagsher|gokishatatagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatatagng|shatatagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatatagnkng|goshatatagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatatagng|gokishatatagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatatagya|shatatagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatatagnkya|goshatatagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatatagya|gokishatatagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatatagyam|shatatagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatatagnkyam|goshatatagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatatagyam|gokishatatagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatatagnĂŒshĂ«|shatatagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatatagnknĂŒshĂ«|goshatatagnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatatagnĂŒshĂ«|gokishatatagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatatagnĂŒro|shatatagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatatagnknĂŒro|goshatatagnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatatagnĂŒro|gokishatatagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatatagnĂŒmu|shatatagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatatagnknĂŒmu|goshatatagnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatatagnĂŒmu|gokishatatagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatatagshĂ«nĂŒ|shatatagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatatagnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatatagnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatatagshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatatagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatatagshĂ«ro|shatatagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatatagnkshĂ«ro|goshatatagnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatatagshĂ«ro|gokishatatagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatatagshĂ«mu|shatatagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatatagnkshĂ«mu|goshatatagnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatatagshĂ«mu|gokishatatagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatatagronĂŒ|shatatagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatatagnkronĂŒ|goshatatagnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatatagronĂŒ|gokishatatagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatatagroshĂ«|shatatagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatatagnkroshĂ«|goshatatagnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatatagroshĂ«|gokishatatagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatatagromu|shatatagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatatagnkromu|goshatatagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatatagromu|gokishatatagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatatagmunĂŒ|shatatagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatatagnkmunĂŒ|goshatatagnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatatagmunĂŒ|gokishatatagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatatagmushĂ«|shatatagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatatagnkmushĂ«|goshatatagnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatatagmushĂ«|gokishatatagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatatagmuro|shatatagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatatagnkmuro|goshatatagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatatagmuro|gokishatatagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|5445898}}
